description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in tactical or urban combat attire, featuring a fitted short-sleeve shirt with a prominent chest armor plate and a red insignia on the left side. He wears digital camouflage-patterned pants, reinforced with knee pads, and sturdy black combat boots. His arms are outstretched horizontally, revealing fingerless gloves and elbow pads, suggesting readiness for action or training. The figure has a well-groomed, short hairstyle with a fade on the sides and a full beard. The overall appearance is that of a security personnel, law enforcement officer, or urban tactical operative. The clothing and accessories are designed for protection and mobility in urban environments.
description: A tactical adult male in urban combat attire with body armor, camouflage pants, and combat boots, posed with arms outstretched. He wears protective gloves, knee and elbow pads, and has a short, styled haircut with a beard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chest armor with red insignia, facial features, gloves, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, arm, and the layered protective gear on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the armor, the full camouflage pants, and the back of the boots and head.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the face, arm, and protective gear.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical short-sleeve shirt with body armor, digital camouflage pants, fingerless gloves, knee and elbow pads
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, neatly styled with a fade on the sides
